category_sources: Official site https://timothyye.github.io/skm/ describes SKM as a simple and powerful SSH Keys Manager.
source_facts.description says it is an SSH keys manager.
display_name_sources: Official site uses SKM in the heading and usage output.
docs_sources: Official GitHub Pages site provides installation, usage, commands, and feature docs: https://timothyye.github.io/skm/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/TimothyYe/skm; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official site lists SSH key creation, listing, default selection, backup, restore, and agent cache features.
